testcase.name: upstreamServerError_stillReturns502
testcase.system-out:
21:33:18.823 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.semantic.gateway.exception.GlobalExceptionHandlerTest]: GlobalExceptionHandlerTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 21:33:18.902 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.semantic.gateway.GatewayApplication for test class com.semantic.gateway.exception.GlobalExceptionHandlerTest 21:33:18.954 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running
. ____ _ __ _ _ /\\ / ___'_ __ _ _(_)_ __ __ _ \ \ \ \ ( ( )\___ | '_ | '_| | '_ \/ _` | \ \ \ \ \\/ ___)| |_)| | | | | || (_| | ) ) ) ) ' |____| .__|_| |_|_| |_\__, | / / / / =========|_|==============|___/=/_/_/_/
:: Spring Boot :: (v3.5.14)
2026-07-04T21:33:19.232+05:30 INFO 33250 --- [ main] c.s.g.e.GlobalExceptionHandlerTest : Starting GlobalExceptionHandlerTest using Java 23.0.1 with PID 33250 (started by abhijeet in /Users/abhijeet/Desktop/ai-semantic-gateway/services/semantic-gateway) 2026-07-04T21:33:19.233+05:30 INFO 33250 --- [ main] c.s.g.e.GlobalExceptionHandlerTest : No active profile set, falling back to 1 default profile: "default" 2026-07-04T21:33:20.432+05:30 INFO 33250 --- [ main] o.s.b.t.m.w.SpringBootMockServletContext : Initializing Spring TestDispatcherServlet '' 2026-07-04T21:33:20.432+05:30 INFO 33250 --- [ main] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Initializing Servlet '' 2026-07-04T21:33:20.433+05:30 INFO 33250 --- [ main] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Completed initialization in 0 ms 2026-07-04T21:33:20.480+05:30 INFO 33250 --- [ main] c.s.g.e.GlobalExceptionHandlerTest : Started GlobalExceptionHandlerTest in 1.53 seconds (process running for 2.159) 2026-07-04T21:33:20.584+05:30 ERROR 33250 --- [ main] c.s.g.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Upstream API error: status=500 body=upstream internal error
testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (/Users/abhijeet/.m2/repository/net/bytebuddy/byte-buddy-agent/1.17.8/byte-buddy-agent-1.17.8.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: databaseError_returns503
testcase.system-out:
2026-07-04T21:33:20.622+05:30 ERROR 33250 --- [ main] c.s.g.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Database error: Connection to 10.0.0.1:5432 refused

testcase.name: upstreamApiError_returns502
testcase.system-out: 2026-07-04T21:33:20.649+05:30 ERROR 33250 --- [ main] c.s.g.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Upstream API error: status=401 body={"error":{"message":"Invalid API key"}}

testcase.name: internalError_responseShape_hasNoStacktrace
testcase.system-out:
2026-07-04T21:33:20.654+05:30 ERROR 33250 --- [ main] c.s.g.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Unexpected error processing request
